name: Canvas Reveal Effect
description: An interactive reveal effect where hovering over an element reveals hidden content underneath using a canvas-based circular mask that follows the cursor.
whenToUse: Use for interactive reveal experiences, before/after comparisons, hidden content reveals, or creative hover interactions.

props.name: opacities
props.description: Array of opacity values for the dot matrix

props.name: colors
props.description: RGB color arrays for the canvas dots

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the container element
